title: Show HN: Bento - An entire PowerPoint in one HTML file (edit+view+data+collab)
author: starfallg
aiHeadline: Finally, a PowerPoint alternative that's as confusing as PowerPoint itself—meet Bento, the all-in-one HTML presentation tool that somehow manages to be both innovative and baffling at the same time.

title: Terrence Tao's ChatGPT Conversation about the Jacobian Conjecture Counterexample
author: gmays
aiHeadline: Terrence Tao teams up with ChatGPT to prove that even geniuses need a robot to do their math—because apparently, humans are just too slow at understanding the Jacobian Conjecture counterexample.

title: OverpAId – Fire your CEO. Hire the future
author: ignaloidas
aiHeadline: Fire your overpaid CEO and hire the future—because apparently, the future is cheaper than your current leadership and also doesn't require a private jet.

title: John C. Dvorak has died
author: coleca
aiHeadline: John C. Dvorak, the man who made tech journalism interesting, has passed away—now the world can finally catch up on all the tech news it missed.

title: Passkeys were invented by engineers with zero understanding of consumer brain
author: ksec
aiHeadline: Passkeys were invented by engineers who clearly have no idea how regular people think—because who in their right mind would want to remember a random string of numbers and letters instead of just using a password?
